Lightweight Retractor Hardware for Professional Display Setup

Professional Trade Show Display Solution

The Retractor Lite 33 Hardware provides a lightweight yet durable aluminum base system designed for professional banner displays at trade shows, retail environments, and indoor promotional events.

Key Features & Benefits:

  • Lightweight aluminum construction for easy transport and setup
  • Available in professional Black or Silver finish options
  • Two swivel feet provide enhanced stability on various surfaces
  • Shock cord pole system enables quick setup and breakdown
  • Snap rail attachment on top with banner tape bottom mounting
  • Compact design fits standard trade show booth spaces

Product Specifications:

  • Display Size: 34.5" W x 84" H x 15" D when fully assembled
  • Hardware Weight: 6.25 lbs for easy portability
  • Banner attachment system included (banner sold separately)
  • Suitable for indoor use and professional environments

Premium Aluminum Base Construction

Our Retractor Lite 33 Hardware features lightweight yet durable aluminum construction that provides the perfect balance of portability and stability for professional display applications.

Production & Turnaround Times for Retractor Hardware Orders

Flexible Production Scheduling

We provide multiple production time options ranging from one to five business days, allowing you to choose the timeline that best fits your trade show or event schedule.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Fast-track production for urgent trade show needs and last-minute display requirements.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day service available in select cases
  • Total delivery time includes production plus shipping duration
  • Turnaround begins when order specifications are confirmed

2 Business Days Express Production

Express service ideal for time-sensitive events with slightly more flexible scheduling.

  • Reliable two-day turnaround for most hardware orders
  • Allows additional time for quality control and packaging
  • Popular choice for planned trade show and retail display setups

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option offering the best balance of speed and value.

  • Standard turnaround time with no rush charges
  • Adequate time for thorough quality inspection
  • Ideal for scheduled events and planned display installations

5 Business Days Saver Production

Cost-effective option for orders with flexible timelines and budget considerations.

  • Reduced pricing for non-urgent hardware orders
  • Extended production window ensures optimal quality control
  • Perfect for advance planning and bulk display purchases

Banner Specifications for Retractor Hardware Compatibility

Important Note: Banner Not Included

The Retractor Lite 33 Hardware is sold separately from banner graphics. Custom banners must be ordered separately and designed to fit the hardware specifications.

Compatible Banner Dimensions:

  • Maximum banner width: 33 inches to fit snap rail system
  • Recommended banner height: Up to 80 inches for optimal display
  • Hardware accommodates display area: 34.5" W x 84" H total
  • Banner material should be appropriate for indoor use

Banner Attachment Requirements:

  • Top attachment: Banner must include snap rail compatible edge
  • Bottom attachment: Banner tape system secures bottom edge
  • Proper finishing ensures smooth banner display without wrinkles
  • Professional hemming recommended for clean appearance

Recommended Banner Materials:

  • Fabric banners for professional trade show appearance
  • Vinyl banners for durable indoor promotional displays
  • Mesh banners for areas with air circulation requirements
  • Canvas materials for upscale retail and corporate environments

Design Considerations:

  • Design artwork to accommodate 33" width limitation
  • Consider viewing height for optimal text and graphic placement
  • Ensure graphics are high resolution for professional appearance
  • Account for banner attachment areas in design layout

Ordering Banner Graphics:

Contact our design team to create custom banners specifically sized for your Retractor Lite 33 Hardware, or browse our retractable banner options with compatible specifications.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Retractor Hardware

Does the Retractor Lite 33 Hardware include a banner?

No, the hardware is sold separately from banner graphics. You will need to order a compatible banner separately or use an existing banner that fits the 33" width and snap rail attachment system.

What is the maximum banner size that works with this hardware?

The hardware accommodates banners up to 33" wide and approximately 80" tall. The total display area is 34.5" W x 84" H when fully assembled.

How much does the Retractor Lite 33 Hardware weigh?

The complete hardware unit weighs 6.25 lbs, making it lightweight and portable for trade shows and events while still providing stable banner display.

What's the difference between Black and Silver finish options?

Both finishes offer the same durability and functionality. Black provides a modern, sleek appearance ideal for high-contrast displays, while Silver offers a classic professional look that complements most banner designs.

How long does it take to set up the retractor hardware?

The shock cord pole system and snap rail attachment make setup very quick - typically under 2 minutes. The two swivel feet adjust easily to accommodate different surfaces.

Can this hardware be used outdoors?

The Retractor Lite 33 Hardware is designed primarily for indoor use. For outdoor applications, we recommend our heavier-duty outdoor banner stands that better withstand wind and weather conditions.

What type of banner attachment system does this hardware use?

The hardware features a snap rail system at the top for secure banner attachment and a banner tape system at the bottom to keep the banner taut and wrinkle-free.

Is assembly required when I receive the hardware?

Minimal assembly is required. The shock cord pole system and banner attachment components come ready to use. Complete setup instructions are included with each hardware unit.

Can I order multiple hardware units for a larger display?

Yes, multiple Retractor Lite 33 Hardware units can be used together to create larger display areas. Each unit supports one banner, so you can create expansive displays by positioning multiple units side by side.

What if I need help designing a banner for this hardware?

Our in-house design team can help you create custom banners specifically sized for your Retractor Lite 33 Hardware. Contact our customer service team to discuss your banner design and printing needs.
